project_type: Next.js 15 monorepo (apps/web) with React Native mobile apps (apps/mobile-staff, apps/mobile-customer, apps/mobile-delivery)
build_system: npm workspaces with turbo, Next.js 15 App Router for web, Expo Router for mobile
test_framework: tsx --test for unit tests, Playwright for E2E, Lighthouse CI for performance
build_command: cd apps/web && npx prisma generate && npx next build
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx prisma generate to verify schema changes. 2. Run npx next build to verify no TypeScript/build errors. 3. Run npm test to verify existing tests pass.
snapshot_or_generated_files: Prisma client is generated from schema.prisma via prisma generate. No snapshot files.
setup_instructions: 1. npm install at root. 2. Set DATABASE_URL env. 3. npx prisma generate in apps/web. 4. npx prisma migrate dev in apps/web.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - can install packages. No database available for migration (CI uses postgres service). Use prisma generate + next build for validation.
contribution_requirements: Standard Next.js conventions. shadcn/ui component patterns. Framer Motion for animations. Zod for validation. Prisma for DB.
key_patterns: Server components by default, client components with 'use client' directive. API routes in app/api/ with NextResponse. Cart state in localStorage via CartProvider context. Auth via next-auth with session. Rate limiting via Upstash Redis. Real-time via SSE/Redis Streams. Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens (text-title, text-body, text-caption, text-micro, card-shadow, press). Mobile-first responsive design.
directory_structure: Root monorepo with apps/web (Next.js customer+admin+delivery web app), apps/mobile-staff (Expo React Native staff app with admin/delivery/packing role groups), apps/mobile-customer (placeholder), apps/mobile-delivery (placeholder), packages/shared (types/branding). Web app: app/ (routes), components/ (UI), lib/ (utilities), prisma/ (schema+seeds), public/ (PWA icons).
